title: OpenAI is so back... GPT 5.6 Sol first look
key_points:
Yesterday, after the government
confirmed it probably wouldn't kill us
all, Open AAI was granted permission to
unleash the GBT 5. 6 family of models
onto the public. It comes in three sizes
with Starbucks naming conventions, three
models named in New Jersey style
Italian, Luna Terra, and the flagship
Gigabrain Soul. A model that shatters
the latest Trust Me Bro benchmarks, and
quite possibly outsmarts Claude Fable,
Mythos, and every other model that came
before it. If you're an agentic
engineer, formerly known as a vibe
coder, this is a huge deal because soul
tops the agentic coding leaderboard. This has
been the Code Report. Thanks for
watching and I will see you in the next
one
